name: che-word-mcp
description: Swift-native MCP server for Microsoft Word document (.docx) manipulation. v3.11.0: Tables / Hyperlinks / Headers extensions (closes #49 #50 #51) — 16 new MCP tools (table conditional formatting + nested + layout + header row + indent + 3 typed hyperlinks with auto-style + even/odd headers + section header map). Built on ooxml-swift v0.17.0. v3.10.0: Styles + Numbering + Sections foundation (#46 #47 #48). v3.9.0: Content Controls (SDT) read/write (#44). v3.8.0: header/footer raw-element preservation (#52).
